name: schwabauerfamily
description: schwabauer.family — a tiny private site for our family. Built on Cloudflare Workers + SvelteKit + delightstack.

scripts.build:deps: node scripts/seed-dist-tsconfig.mjs && pnpm -C delightstack/packages/utilities build && pnpm -C delightstack/packages/components build && node scripts/seed-dist-tsconfig.mjs
scripts.postinstall: (node scripts/seed-dist-tsconfig.mjs && pnpm -C delightstack/packages/utilities build && pnpm -C delightstack/packages/components build && node scripts/seed-dist-tsconfig.mjs) || true
